problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: If Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site is applied to or, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
